DEXA Scan Results

Aug 14, 2025

Significant improvement in body composition
21.3%
Body Fat
Lean Mass: 78.7 kg
Visceral Fat: 2.1
Bone Density: 1.18 g/cm²

Jan 19, 2024

Baseline assessment prior to treatment
31.1%
Body Fat
Lean Mass: 68.9 kg
Visceral Fat: 3.8
Bone Density: 1.12 g/cm²

Body Composition Trends

Hormone Correlation Analysis

Key Findings

  • Testosterone Optimization Impact: Your testosterone increase from 281 to 853 ng/dl correlates directly with the 9.8% body fat reduction.
  • Muscle Preservation: Lean mass increased by 9.8 lbs while losing fat - indicating proper hormone balance.
  • Visceral Fat Improvement: Dangerous visceral fat reduced from 3.8 to 2.1 - excellent cardiovascular benefit.
  • Bone Health: Bone density improved from 1.12 to 1.18 g/cm² - testosterone supports bone strength.
